configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-ninja-release
configurePresets.description: Inner SOURCE_DIR is lib/Zelda64Recomp (preserves upstream CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR). Inner BINARY_DIR: build-engine/.

configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-vs2022-release-afa-product
configurePresets.displayName: AeroAssault64 root: ExternalProject with AEROASSAULT64_AFA_PRODUCT (VS 2022 x64, stub patches/RSP)
configurePresets.description: Forwards -DAEROASSAULT64_AFA_PRODUCT=ON to inner Zelda64Recomp. Run python3 tools/phase6_materialize_no_mm_engine_files.py (or make phase6-materialize-stubs) before configure.

configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-ninja-release-no-mm
configurePresets.displayName: AeroAssault64 root: ExternalProject with AEROASSAULT64_NO_MM_ROM (stub patches/RSP)
configurePresets.description: Forwards -DAEROASSAULT64_NO_MM_ROM=ON to inner Zelda64Recomp. Run python3 tools/phase6_materialize_no_mm_engine_files.py (or make phase6-materialize-stubs) before configure.

configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-ninja-release-afa-product
configurePresets.displayName: AeroAssault64 root: ExternalProject with AEROASSAULT64_AFA_PRODUCT (stub patches/RSP)
configurePresets.description: Forwards -DAEROASSAULT64_AFA_PRODUCT=ON to inner Zelda64Recomp (AFA retail path; skips MM patches.elf pipeline). Run python3 tools/phase6_materialize_no_mm_engine_files.py before configure (same RecompiledPatches stubs as no-MM).

configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-ninja-release-afa-product-retail
configurePresets.displayName: AeroAssault64 root: AFA_PRODUCT + AFA_RETAIL_PIPELINES (real patches.toml PatchesLib)
configurePresets.description: Forwards AEROASSAULT64_AFA_PRODUCT and AEROASSAULT64_AFA_RETAIL_PIPELINES. Requires engine patches.elf, patches.toml, N64Recomp RecompiledPatches output — see lib/Zelda64Recomp/AFA_PORT.md §2.

configurePresets.name: engine-superbuild-vs2022-release-afa-product-retail
configurePresets.description: Same as engine-superbuild-ninja-release-afa-product-retail but Visual Studio 17 2022 x64.
